name: Mocha-Walnut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter until smooth.
3. Add both sugars and beat well until combined.
4. Add egg and mix thoroughly.
5. Gradually add flour, instant coffee powder, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, vanilla, and half the walnuts into the mixture. Mix until just combined.
6. Wrap dough in wax paper and chill thoroughly in the refrigerator for at least two hours.
7. Remove dough from the refrigerator.
8. Using rounded teaspoonfuls of dough, shape into balls using palms of hands and place 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 12-15 minutes until lightly golden brown.
10. Remove cookie sheet from oven and working quickly, place 3-4 chocolate chips in the center of each hot cookie.
11. When chocolate has softened, spread over top and sprinkle with remaining walnuts.
12. Remove cookies to a wire rack and allow to cool completely.
